case_title: KWAME A. BABUKAR VS. SYLVIA MCCLEARY

docket_entries.description: EVIDENCE PACKET (FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE)RECEIVED VIA MAIL FORWARDED TO COURT (RM506) FOR HEARING ON MAR-26-10 @ 3:30PM FILED BY PLAINTIFF BABUKAR, KWAME A.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,650.00 FILED BY BABUKAR, KWAME A. AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLEARY, SYLVIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE IS "GRANTED". MAILED TO PLAINTIFF.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00) SERVED FEB-10-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLEARY, SYLVIA
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF APPEARS BY TELEPHONE. DEFENDANT PRESENT. IN COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFNEDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BABUKAR, KWAME A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCCLEARY, SYLVIA THE COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT'S PREVIOUS REFUND OF $297.00 IS CORRECT, AND THAT PLAINTIFF IS NOT ENTITLED TO ADDIONAL DMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
LETTER REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE RECEIVED AND FILED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BABUKAR, KWAME A.
